channel.title: numerical modeling on Geophydog
channel.description: Recent content in numerical modeling on Geophydog

item.title: Numerical Modeling of Acoustic Wave Propagation
item.description: 1 Acoustic wave equation The acoustic wave equation in vector form is given by $$ p_{tt}=c^2 \nabla^2 p \tag{1} $$ where, $p$ the acoustic pressure, $c$ is the propagation speed of acoustic wave, $p_{tt}$ is the second time derivative of $p$, and $\nabla^2$ denotes the $Laplacian$ operator. We will discretize the equation using finite difference method in the following parts. 2 Propagation in 1D space The Taylar’s series of $p(t+\Delta t)$ and $p(t-\Delta t)$ are given by
